about: @tl;dr 🚲 > ABOUT     "At 38 years old holds a B.Sc. as a Civil Structural Engineer, Corporate Analyst for 3y, Investment Banker and Private Equity analyst for 10y, pivoting into Software and Product Engineering. For 5y lived in 5 EU cities, moved over 170+ cities across 40+ countries, with Spanish and Brazilian roots based in Germany."   ---     @experiences ⛵ >> COMPUTER SCIENCE       In a three-years Software Engineering course pursuing a career shift. Projects handling: Data Structures in C, Algorithms in C, System Process in Unix, Network Architecture and Web Servers, Computer Graphics and Games. >> CAPITAL MARKETS       For 10 years in Capital Markets, played roles as Investment Banker, Venture Capital Analyst, Portfolio Manager in Wealth Management and Real Estate Private Equity Analyst. >> CORPORATE BUSINESS       For 4 years in Real Estate Development played roles in: Business Development, FP&A and Investor Relations. >> CIVIL ENGINEERING       For 2 years managed on-site construction of 2 residential towers and builded 9 emergency houses for poverty alleviation.  >>> INTERNATIONAL EXPERIENCE       For 5 years travelled to 170+ cities over 40+ countries across 5 continents; Lived in 5 european cities, born and raised in São Paulo. >>> NGO       For 2 years worked at an NGO on social development and poverty alleviation. >>> ARMY        For 1 year forged as a cadet in the Army Reserve Officers' Training Corps; Commissioned as a 2nd Lieutenant, Ordnance Corps.  @studies ✒️  >> COMPUTER SCIENCE       Course Software Engineering (3 years); Course Product Management (3 months).  >> CAPITAL MARKETS       Specialization in Investment Banking, Private Equity and Portfolio Management (1 year); Course Macro Economics Modeling (3 months).  >> ENGINEERING       B.Sc. Civil Engineering (5 years). Majors: Structural, Water and Transportation. Minors: Math and Physics.  >> LANGUAGES       Portuguese (Native), English (C1), Spanish (B2), Gallego (B1) and Deutsche (A1); Holds Spanish and Brazilian citizenship.  @personal ⚖️ •  INTERESTS       Modern Physics (Quantum and Particle), Global Macro, Mediterranean and Vegetarian Cooking, Backpacking, Jazzy Music. •  ENDURANCE        Hiking, Rock Climbing, Cycling, Skydiving and Bungee Jump. •  COMPETING       Tennis (5y), Handball (3y), Rugby (1y) and Waterpolo (1y). •  MINDFULNESS        Aikido, Yoga and Meditation. •  PURSUITS       Oceans Seven Endurance, pre-Tour de France cycling and Seven Summits hike.    🔗 https://linktree.diegonmarcos.com

projects.title: CAPITAL MARKETS | CORPORATE | CIVIL ENGINEERING
projects.description: @brief:   Capital Markets | Corporate | Civil Engineering    "Risk comes from not knowing what you're doing."    — Warren Buffett | Charlie Munger   ---   CAPITAL MARKETS a) Investment Banking / Advisory (ECM/DCM)    i) Structuring (Modeling and DD) of R$ 500Mi in MBS;    ii) Structuring Mezzanine debt of R$ 100Mi;    iii) Structuring BTS and Sales & Leaseback;    iv) Structuring and Private Placement of 5 companies in the Retail and Technology sector R$ 50Mi.   b) Portfolio Manager / Private Equity / WM / Credit / Risk  / Compliance    i) Constitution and Management      -10 exclusive funds (FIM/FIDC/FIP) AuM of R$500Mi - Offers 476;     - 2 MBS Funds with R$ 500Mi AuM - Offers 476/400;     - 3 Funds Private Credit with AuM of R$ 350Mi.    ii) Acquisitions      (1) MBS – R$ 350Mi;      (2) Land for Real Estate Development - Sales R$ 200Mi;      (3) LF/DEB – R$ 200Mi.    iii) Structuring of the front, middle, compliance, and risk elaborating  processes and analysis criteria of an asset management company.    iv) Management and Risk/Compliance Committees.   c) Venture Capital / Corporate Venture Capital    i) Structuring companies: Asset, Mortgage Bank, and Credit Servicer.    ii) Acquisition of 4 Startups focused on ESG - AuM 200Mi.   CORPORATE BUSINESS  a) Business Development / FP&A / Investor Relations /  Project and Product Management    i) Follow-on and MBS/Private Debit – R$ 350Mi;    ii) Launch of real estate developments – Sales R$ 750Mi;    iii) Land for real estate business development – Sales R$ 500Mi;    iv) Financial modeling, product & project management, and construction   CIVIL ENGINEER  a) Construction Field    i) Design, Plan, Management, and Development of 2 tower building    ii) Construction of 9 houses for emergency housing acting directly on the  building field of each house;   .

projects.title: ARMY SERVICE
projects.description: @brief: Graded as Second Lieutenant of Logistics Brigade, from the Army Reserve Officers' Training Corps for the Brazilian Army. (1 year | 2,016 hours)  "If you know the enemy and know yourself, you need not fear the result of a hundred battles." —Sun Tzu, The Art Of War (1963)   ---   @curriculum: - Lectures and courses on Command and Leadership Corps - Analysis of all codes, laws and norms that permeate the Army - Exercising logistics and control functions within the battalion - Camps with total immersion, focusing on instruction for wilderness survival in combat - Logistics designing, implementation and managing a maintenance workshop weapons and armored fighting  - Theoretical and practical instructions for the graduation of an Army Officer (Leadership & Command, Military Strategy & Tactics, Physical & Mental Resilience, Ethics & Law, Logistics & Operations)  - Specialization in Corps Ordnance (Maintenance, Logistics, Supply and Transportation)  (https://instagram.com/cporsp_exercito)   .
